title: Knowledge Base (RAG)
supportDesc: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) allows the AI to search your own private documents to provide more accurate responses. Use Mineru or LlamaParse for document parsing and Upstash for lightning-fast retrieval.
localDocumentProcessingDesc: Files are parsed by your self-hosted doc-parser container. No MinerU or LlamaParse key is required. This version supports text-layer PDFs, DOCX, XLSX, XLS, and PPTX; scanned PDFs do not include OCR yet.
localDocumentProcessingUnavailableDesc: Check DOCUMENT_PARSE_BASE_URL, the doc-parser health status, and the Compose network connection.
defaultDocumentProcessingDesc: Use the server-configured parser without entering a key.
mineruHelp: Mineru parses documents without a token by default. Add a token for the precise parsing API.
llamaParseHelp: Retrieves high-quality markdown and tables from complex documents like PDFs.
chunkSizeHelp: Determines the size of text segments stored in the database. Smaller chunks (e.g. 512) offer more precise retrieval, while larger chunks (e.g. 2048) provide more context per result.
defaultVectorStorageDesc: Use the server-configured vector store without entering a URL or token.
